---
title: "rig config"
---

<!-- Generated by website/gen-cli-reference.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

## `rig config`

```text
Manage rig configuration

Usage: rig config [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Commands:
  config-file-path  Print the path to the rig config file
  get               Get a config entry
  list              List the names of all config entries
  set               Set a config entry
  help              Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```

### `rig config config-file-path`

```text
Print the path to the rig config file

Usage: rig config config-file-path [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```

### `rig config get`

```text
Get a config entry

Usage: rig config get [OPTIONS] <key>

Arguments:
  <key>  config key to get

Options:
      --json   JSON output
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```

### `rig config list`

```text
List the names of all config entries

Usage: rig config list [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --json   JSON output
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```

### `rig config set`

```text
Set a config entry

Usage: rig config set [OPTIONS] <keyvalue>

Arguments:
  <keyvalue>  key=value pair to set

Options:
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```
